meta.purpose: Complete machine-readable specification of the Medical Aesthetic Clinics component library, design system, and project assets. Any AI can use this file to understand, generate, and compose UI from these components.
meta.how_to_use: Each component entry documents its file path, exports, props (with types and defaults), dependencies, category, interactivity, and rendering notes. The design_system section documents all brand tokens, CSS variables, keyframe animations, and utility classes. Use this file to auto-generate pages, validate component usage, or understand the full project surface area.

project.name: Medical Aesthetic Clinics / MedSpa
project.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + inline CSS variables
project.ui_primitives: Radix UI (accordion, dialog, label, radio-group, slot, icons)

design_system.design_vibe: Premium dark luxury — gold accents on charcoal, think Equinox VIP lounge meets medical aesthetics

page_theme_constants._note: Used in page-level components as a JS object named C

usage_rules.never_use: Default Tailwind blue/indigo — always use gold palette

body.applies_to: body, p, a, button, input, nav, labels

gold-glow.use_for: Subtle gold glow on cards, inputs, feature items

gold-glow-lg.use_for: Strong gold glow for highlighted/featured cards

card-lift.css: transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; &:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(198,167,94,0.12) }

luxury-bg.css: background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 20%, rgba(198,167,94,0.07), transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, rgba(232,216,195,0.05), transparent 50%), #111111
luxury-bg.use_for: Section backgrounds with subtle radial gold glows

grain-overlay.css: ::before with SVG noise filter at opacity 0.035
grain-overlay.use_for: Film-grain texture overlay for luxury feel

gold-rule.css: height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, rgba(198,167,94,0.35), transparent)

shiny-gold-btn.css: Rotating conic-gradient shimmer border, dot pattern overlay, inner glow, CSS @property animations
shiny-gold-btn.use_for: Premium gold CTA buttons (GoldShinyButton component wraps this class)

spotlight.css: 0%: opacity:0, translate(-72%,-62%) scale(0.5) → 100%: opacity:1, translate(-50%,-40%) scale(1)

fadeInUp.css: from: opacity:0, translateY(28px) → to: opacity:1, translateY(0)
fadeInUp.use_for: Primary scroll-reveal for text, cards, sections

sgb-rotate.use_for: Shiny gold button conic gradient rotation

sgb-breathe.use_for: Shiny gold button inner glow breathing

components.name: 21st-navbar
components.interactive_details: Hover dropdowns with perspective transform, mobile hamburger toggle
components.description: Full-featured responsive navbar with sticky scroll behavior, dropdown menus with 3D entrance animation, mobile slide-in menu, and theme switching support.

components.name: accordion
components.interactive_details: Click to expand/collapse with height animation, keyboard accessible, chevron rotation indicator
components.description: Accessible accordion built on Radix UI primitives with animated expand/collapse, chevron rotation, and keyboard navigation.

components.name: animated-shiny-text
components.description: Text wrapper that applies a shimmering gold gradient sweep animation. Uses CSS background-clip text technique with configurable shimmer width.

components.name: background-paths
components.interactive_details: Auto-animated flowing SVG paths with staggered entrance
components.description: Full-screen hero background with 36 animated SVG bezier paths that flow in with staggered spring animations. Adjustable path color and opacity for brand customization.

components.name: badge
components.description: Small status badge with 4 visual variants. Uses class-variance-authority for variant management.

components.name: button

asChild.note: Renders as Slot, passing props to child element

components.interactive_details: Hover bg change, focus-visible ring, active press, disabled state
components.description: Core button component with 6 visual variants and 4 sizes. Supports polymorphic rendering via asChild (Radix Slot). Standard shadcn/ui pattern.

components.name: card-with-noise-pattern
components.interactive_details: Hover card-lift effect
components.description: Card with SVG noise texture background overlay and dark gradient. Creates a tactile, premium look. Body component provides padded content area.

components.name: card
components.description: Standard shadcn/ui card with 6 composable slot components. Dark theme with gold-tinted border.

components.name: container-scroll-animation

children.note: Content inside the 3D-rotating card (typically an image)

components.interactive_details: Scroll-driven: card rotates in 3D perspective, scales, and translates as user scrolls through the section
components.description: Scroll-driven 3D card animation. As the user scrolls, the card rotates from a tilted perspective to flat, scales up, and reveals content. Title component fades above.

components.name: dialog
components.interactive_details: Focus trap, ESC to close, overlay click to close, animated entrance/exit
components.children_pattern: Dialog > DialogTrigger + DialogContent(DialogHeader(DialogTitle + DialogDescription) + content + DialogFooter)
components.description: Accessible modal dialog built on Radix primitives. Features focus trap, keyboard dismissal, backdrop overlay, and X close button.

components.name: docks
components.interactive_details: Hover tooltip labels, glassmorphism backdrop-blur
components.description: Self-contained macOS-style dock with glassmorphism background, icon buttons, and hover tooltips. Hardcoded icons and links.

components.name: fey-button
components.interactive_details: Hover radial gradient glow, disabled state
components.description: Premium pill-shaped button with radial gradient backdrop, complex inset shadows, and theme-aware styling. Includes a lock icon.

components.name: glowing-effect
components.interactive_details: Mouse-tracking conic-gradient border glow that follows the pointer. Scroll-aware activation.
components.children_note: Decorative overlay — place as sibling inside a parent container. Uses rounded-[inherit].
components.description: Mouse-following conic-gradient glow border effect. The gold variant uses the brand gold palette. Placed as a sibling element inside a positioned parent.

components.name: header-1
components.interactive_details: Scroll-aware sticky behavior, mobile hamburger with fullscreen portal menu, smooth scroll navigation links
components.description: Production-ready branded sticky header with gold CTA button, desktop navigation links, mobile fullscreen menu rendered via React portal. Hardcoded Koushik AI branding.

components.name: hero-shutter-text
components.interactive_details: Click-to-replay shutter animation, replay button at bottom
components.description: Large hero text with horizontal shutter-slice reveal animation. Each character is split into 3 horizontal slices that sweep across. Includes a replay button.

components.name: infinite-slider
components.interactive_details: Speed change on hover (durationOnHover / speedOnHover)
components.description: Infinite looping marquee slider that duplicates its children for seamless continuous scroll. Supports horizontal/vertical direction, reverse mode, and hover speed control.

components.name: label
components.description: Accessible form label built on Radix Label primitive with peer-disabled styling.

components.name: liquid-button
components.interactive_details: Hover morphing blobs (SVG goo filter), click ripple circles, spring scale animation
components.description: Premium gold liquid-morphing button with SVG goo filter creating organic blob shapes on hover. Click produces ripple circles. Primary variant has gold gradient, secondary is ghost.

components.name: liquid-glass-button
components.interactive_details: Hover scale, focus-visible ring, SVG turbulence displacement filter for glass distortion
components.description: Two-in-one component: a standard Button (with extra 'cool' variant) plus a LiquidButton with SVG feTurbulence glass distortion filter and complex inset shadow layering.

components.name: logo-cloud-3
components.interactive_details: Hover opacity change, speed change on hover (via InfiniteSlider)
components.description: Infinite scrolling logo cloud with edge-fade gradient mask. Logos are displayed with inverted grayscale filter, driven by data array.

components.name: menu-toggle-icon
components.interactive_details: Animated SVG path morph between hamburger (3 lines) ↔ X (cross)
components.description: Animated hamburger-to-X toggle icon using SVG stroke-dasharray and dashoffset transitions. Controlled via the open prop.

components.name: modal-pricing
components.interactive_details: Dialog open/close, radio group plan selection, hover states, keyboard accessible
components.description: Modal dialog with radio-group plan selector, feature comparison lists, and confirm/cancel buttons. Data-driven via plans prop with sensible defaults.

components.name: neon-button
components.interactive_details: Hover neon glow lines (blue gradient sweep at top and bottom edges)
components.description: Button with optional neon glow effect — gradient lines appear on hover at top and bottom edges. Can be toggled off via neon={false}.

components.name: pricing-card
components.interactive_details: Animated number transitions via NumberFlow, button hover states, highlighted/popular decorative variants
components.description: Pricing tier card with animated number transitions (NumberFlow), feature checklist, and popular/highlighted visual variants with decorative gradient backgrounds.

components.name: pricing-section
components.interactive_details: Tab switching between billing frequencies, cards respond to frequency selection
components.description: Complete pricing section layout with frequency toggle tabs (monthly/yearly) and responsive grid of pricing cards. Fully data-driven.

components.name: pricing-tab
components.interactive_details: Click selection with spring-animated background pill (Framer Motion layoutId), optional 'Save 35%' discount badge
components.description: Animated pricing toggle tab with shared layout animation for the active indicator pill. Optional discount badge appears on yearly plans.

components.name: radio-group
components.interactive_details: Radio selection, keyboard navigation, focus-visible ring
components.description: Accessible radio group built on Radix primitives with circle indicator icon.

components.name: shader-animation
components.interactive_details: Auto-animating time-based GLSL shader
components.webgl_details: Full Three.js WebGL renderer with custom GLSL fragment shader. Creates concentric animated color rings.
components.description: Full-screen WebGL shader animation with concentric color rings. Uses Three.js PlaneGeometry with custom ShaderMaterial and time-based GLSL fragment shader.

components.name: shader-lines

exports.name: ShaderAnimation
exports.note: Same export name as shader-animation.tsx — use aliased import

dependencies: three (CDN r89 — loaded via script injection into window.THREE)
components.interactive_details: Auto-animating mosaic GLSL shader
components.webgl_details: Three.js loaded via CDN script tag (r89). Creates pixelated mosaic shader effect with color rings. Absolute positioned overlay.
components.description: Pixelated/mosaic WebGL shader effect with color rings. Loads Three.js r89 from CDN. Renders as an absolute positioned overlay canvas.
components.import_warning: Same export name 'ShaderAnimation' as shader-animation.tsx — use import alias: import { ShaderAnimation as ShaderLines } from './shader-lines'

components.name: shape-landing-hero
components.interactive_details: Auto-animated floating pill shapes with staggered entrance, continuous float animation
components.description: Full-screen hero section with 5 floating semi-transparent pill shapes, staggered entrance animation, gradient text title, and badge. Shapes have continuous floating animation.

components.name: shiny-button

href.note: Renders as <a> instead of <button> when provided

components.css_dependency: Requires .shiny-gold-btn class from globals.css (CSS @property animations, conic-gradient rotation, dot pattern)
components.interactive_details: Hover/focus-visible activates rotating conic-gradient shimmer, dot pattern overlay, and inner glow breathing (all CSS-only via @property)
components.description: Premium gold CTA button with CSS-only rotating shimmer effect, conic gradient border, dot pattern overlay, and breathing inner glow. The hero CTA button of the design system.

components.name: sign-in-flow-1
components.interactive_details: 3-step sign-in flow: email input → 6-digit OTP → success. Animated step transitions, Google sign-in button.
components.webgl_details: Three.js via @react-three/fiber with custom GLSL3 dot-matrix reveal shader for background effect
components.description: Complete 3-step sign-in flow (email → OTP → success) with WebGL dot-matrix canvas reveal background effect and animated step transitions. Fully self-contained page component.

components.name: social-links
components.interactive_details: Hover shows floating image popover above name with random rotation, click bounce scale, non-hovered items dim in opacity
components.description: Social media links row with floating image popover on hover, random rotation, click scale animation, and opacity dimming of non-hovered items.

components.name: splite
components.interactive_details: Spline 3D scenes are fully interactive (rotate, zoom, click) depending on scene configuration
components.webgl_details: Spline 3D WebGL scene loaded from URL. Lazy-loaded with React.lazy + Suspense.
components.description: Lazy-loaded Spline 3D scene wrapper with loading spinner and fade-in transition. Renders any Spline scene URL as an interactive 3D WebGL canvas.

components.name: spotlight

fill.note: Fill color for the spotlight SVG beam

components.description: SVG spotlight beam effect with gaussian blur filter. Animated entrance via CSS animate-spotlight keyframes. Decorative overlay for hero sections.

components.name: text-scramble
components.interactive_details: Trigger-controlled text decode animation
components.children_note: String children only — used as the target text to decode into
components.description: Text scramble/decode effect that progressively reveals target text character by character through random character cycling. Configurable speed, duration, and character set.

components.name: tubelight-navbar
components.interactive_details: Click tab selection with spring-animated 'tubelight' glow indicator that follows selected tab. Icons on mobile, text labels on desktop.
components.description: Fixed-position pill-shaped navbar with animated glowing tubelight indicator. Bottom-positioned on mobile, top on desktop. Renders icons on mobile and text on desktop.

components.name: use-scroll

threshold.note: Pixel value — returns true when window.scrollY exceeds this

components.description: Custom React hook that returns a boolean indicating whether the user has scrolled past the given threshold. Used by header-1 for sticky scroll behavior.

components.name: web-gl-shader
components.interactive_details: Auto-animating time-based GLSL shader
components.webgl_details: Full Three.js WebGL renderer with RawShaderMaterial. Custom vertex + fragment GLSL shaders with uniform controls for xScale, yScale, and distortion. Produces animated sine-wave RGB light lines.
components.description: Full-screen fixed-position canvas with animated sine-wave RGB light lines shader. Uses Three.js RawShaderMaterial with custom vertex and fragment shaders.

button.description: Interactive button variants ranging from standard (button) to premium animated (liquid-button, shiny-button)

card.description: Card container components with composable slots

navigation.description: Navigation components from full headers to tab selectors

hero.description: Full-screen hero section components with dramatic animations

effect.description: Visual effects — decorative overlays, shaders, glows

pricing.description: Complete pricing flow: section → cards → modal confirmation

form.description: Form inputs and complete sign-in flow

pages.app/dental/page.tsx: Dental clinic premium landing page (~2660 lines, uses 15+ components)
pages.app/components/page.tsx: Full-screen interactive component showcase (all 38 components, 100vh sections)

alias_required.shader-lines: import { ShaderAnimation as ShaderLines } from '@/components/ui/shader-lines' — conflicts with shader-animation.tsx export name

import_patterns.naming_convention: PascalCase for components, camelCase for hooks, kebab-case for files

hero_section.description: Premium hero with spotlight, text scramble, and CTA
hero_section.pattern: BackgroundPaths as bg → Spotlight overlay → TextScramble for headings → GoldShinyButton CTA

pricing_flow.description: Complete pricing with tabs and modal
pricing_flow.pattern: PricingSection(tiers, frequencies) → auto-renders Tab + PricingCard grid → ModalPricing for plan selection

interactive_card.description: Card with glow effect and hover lift
interactive_card.pattern: relative parent → GlowingEffect(variant='gold') as first child → NoisePatternCard with content

navigation.pattern: Header (sticky top, desktop links + mobile menu) + NavBar (fixed bottom pill on mobile)
